caption: A man wearing a white short-sleeved button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and glasses sits in a studio setting. He wears a large, grey, powdered-style wig and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and he appears to be speaking, as his mouth moves and his facial expression shifts slightly across the sequence. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items hanging on racks. On the left side of the scene, a logo for a podcast is visible, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". A similar logo is partially visible on the right side of the frame. The man remains in the same position throughout the clip, with only minor changes in his head tilt and mouth movement as he speaks.
